name: Sierra Leone

colors.symbolism: agriculture, the mountains, and the natural resources of the country
the natural harbour of Freetown and the hope of contributing to world peace through its use

description: Three equal horizontal stripes of green (top), white, and blue.
history: Adopted on 27 April 1961, the day Sierra Leone gained independence from the United Kingdom. The flag was designed by the College of Arms and has been used unchanged since independence.
